name: DesignOps Plugin
description: Skills-based design ops plugin for Detroit Labs designers to run Figma design tasks via Claude Code commands
author: Detroit Labs

skills.name: new-project
skills.description: Scaffold a new Figma project by duplicating the standard Detroit Labs template files (Workshop, Summary, Foundations, Master Files) into the correct team folder hierarchy.

team.description: Exact Figma team name (case-sensitive). Prompted interactively if omitted.

name.description: Project name — used in all file titles. Prompted interactively if omitted.

platform.description: Primary platform, used if /create-design-system is chained after setup. Prompted if omitted.

skills.name: create-design-system
skills.description: Initialize a design system in a Figma file by pushing brand tokens into the Primitives variable collection and the appropriate platform alias collection (Web, Android/M3, or iOS/HIG).

skills.name: sync-design-system
skills.description: Diff a local token file (tokens.json or tailwind.config.js) against the current Figma variable state and push changes in either direction — code-to-Figma or Figma-to-code.

file_key.description: Figma file URL or key to sync against. Falls back to handoff context or interactive prompt if omitted.

skills.name: create-component
skills.description: Install one or more shadcn/ui components locally via the shadcn CLI, draw the component structure onto the Figma canvas with token variable bindings, and optionally invoke /code-connect to link the new components.

components.description: shadcn/ui component names to install and draw

skills.name: code-connect
skills.description: Map Figma components to their codebase counterparts using Figma Code Connect. Calls get_code_connect_suggestions, generates mappings, confirms with the designer, and publishes via send_code_connect_mappings.

file_key.description: Figma file URL or key. Falls back to handoff context or interactive prompt if omitted.

skills.name: new-language
skills.description: Localize a Figma frame into a new language. Duplicates the frame to a new page named for the locale, extracts all text nodes, translates inline via Claude, and writes translated strings back. Flags RTL languages for layout mirroring review.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale code (e.g. es, fr, ar, ja). Prompted interactively with reference table if omitted.

node_id.description: Figma node ID of the source frame (e.g. 123:456). Prompted interactively if omitted.

skills.name: accessibility-check
skills.description: Run a WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit on a selected Figma frame: contrast ratios, minimum text sizes, iOS Dynamic Type simulation (12-step Apple scale), and Android font scaling simulation (100/130/150/200%).

node_id.description: Figma node ID of the frame to audit (e.g. 123:456). Prompted interactively if omitted.
